full_description: use the specified hand to move each briefly marked block onto the colored target line
schema: {A} denotes the blocks, {B} denotes the colored target line, and {C} denotes the specified hand. The instruction does not reveal which block will be marked next.
preference: Mention the specified hand and colored target line, but do not reveal block order or block identity.
seen: Use {C} to move each marked {A} onto {B}.
Use {C} to follow the brief marker and place the selected {A} on {B}.
Use {C} to put every highlighted {A} onto {B}.
With {C}, move each {A} that gets marked onto {B}.
Use {C} to watch the short signal and place the chosen {A} on {B}.
unseen: With {C}, place each flashed target {A} onto {B}.
Use {C} to collect the marked {A} on {B}.
Use {C} to move each briefly signaled {A} onto {B}.
Use {C} to follow the short cue and move each selected {A} onto {B}.
